description: Common prompt-injection signal patterns. Use as a layered defense, not a substitute for system-prompt isolation and output validation.

indicators.regex: (?i)the following document contains instructions for the (assistant|model)

defense_layers: System / user / tool messages live in separate roles; user content never carries higher-trust instructions
Retrieved documents are wrapped in a 'untrusted_context' block with explicit anti-instruction guard
Output schema validation rejects anything that isn't well-formed for the next step
Tool-call allowlist enforced at the orchestrator, not the model
Per-user authorization re-checked on every tool call, not assumed from session
